expectedDifferences.reason: The local proxy creates a deterministic synthetic MarketWebPresence id while the capture stores Shopify's disposable live id.

notes: HAR-613 coverage for a staged subfolder web presence with defaultLocale en, alternateLocales fr/de, and subfolderSuffix intl. The live capture script enables and restores fr/de locales so Shopify accepts the scenario; this spec asserts the documented HAR-613 rootUrls contract while the raw live response remains in cases[5] for audit evidence.
